label: Taipei
sub: Taiwan capital; Presidential Office, Ministry of National Defense

label: Beijing
sub: PRC capital; Central Military Commission, Taiwan Affairs Office

label: Kadena AB
sub: US Air Force primary forward base; F-22, F-35 squadrons; ~650 km from China

label: Andersen AFB (Guam)
sub: USAF strategic bomber base; B-52, B-2 rotational deployments; long-range strike hub

label: USS Ronald Reagan CSG
sub: CVN-76 carrier strike group; repositioned to Philippine Sea during Aug 2022 PLA exercises

label: CCK Air Base
sub: Taiwan ROCAF Ching Chuan Kang AB, Taichung; 3rd Tactical Fighter Wing; F-CK-1 fighters

label: Hualien AB
sub: ROCAF Hualien/Chiashan Air Base; underground hardened facility; F-16 Wing; most survivable counter-attack base

label: Tainan AB
sub: ROCAF Tainan Air Base; F-16A/B Wing; southern Taiwan air defense anchor

label: PLA Exercise Zone — North
sub: One of 6 PLA live-fire exercise zones Aug 4–11, 2022; covers approaches north of Taiwan

label: PLA Exercise Zone — Northeast
sub: PLA live-fire zone northeast of Taiwan; Aug 2022 Fourth Taiwan Strait Crisis

label: PLA Exercise Zone — East
sub: PLA live-fire zone east of Taiwan; most operationally significant; crosses Pacific approaches

label: PLA Exercise Zone — Southeast
sub: PLA live-fire zone southeast of Taiwan; Aug 2022

label: PLA Exercise Zone — Southwest
sub: PLA live-fire zone southwest of Taiwan; Aug 2022

label: PLA Exercise Zone — West (Strait)
sub: PLA live-fire zone inside Taiwan Strait; Aug 2022; overlaps Taiwan's 24 nm contiguous zone

label: Longtian Airfield (PLA)
sub: PLAAF Longtian forward airfield, Fujian Province; key Taiwan contingency base ~300 km from Taipei

label: Zhangzhou Airfield (PLA)
sub: PLAAF Zhangzhou air base, Fujian; ~330 km from central Taiwan; key J-10/J-11 deployment base

label: Huian Airfield (PLA)
sub: PLAAF Huian air base, Fujian; closest PLA airfield to Taiwan Strait midpoint; <200 km to median line

label: Kinmen
sub: Taiwan-controlled offshore island 3 km from China's Xiamen; subject of PLA drone overflights and coast guard incursions

label: Matsu Islands
sub: Taiwan-controlled Matsu island chain near Fuzhou; PLA drone activity since 2022; surrounded in Joint Sword-2024A

label: Median Line — North
sub: Taiwan Strait median line (tacit boundary since 1950s); systematically crossed by PLA after Aug 2022

label: TSMC HQ (Hsinchu)
sub: TSMC global headquarters and primary fab complex; 70%+ global foundry share; strategic global choke point

label: TSMC Fab — Taichung
sub: TSMC Taichung fab complex; advanced packaging and mature node manufacturing

label: Luzon Strait
sub: Southern Taiwan Strait access; key US carrier transit route; PLA submarine egress point

label: Paracel Islands
sub: PRC-controlled disputed archipelago; PLAAF/PLAN deployment base for South China Sea operations

label: Spratly Islands
sub: Disputed archipelago; PRC artificial islands with military installations; multilateral claimants

label: Tokyo
sub: Japan capital; key US ally; Taiwan security stakeholder; doubled defense budget 2023

label: Yokosuka (7th Fleet HQ)
sub: US Navy 7th Fleet headquarters; forward-deployed carrier USS Ronald Reagan home port

label: PLA Eastern Theater HQ (Nanjing)
sub: PLA Eastern Theater Command headquarters; primary command for Taiwan contingency operations

label: Taiwan Presidential Office
sub: Seat of Taiwan's executive government; Lai Ching-te inaugurated May 20, 2024

label: Camp Humphreys (USFK)
sub: US Forces Korea primary base; F-16, A-10 presence; regional deterrence anchor

label: Taiwan Strait
sub: ~180 km wide strait; historically divided by tacit median line; now patrolled continuously by PLA

label: Hengchun Peninsula
sub: Site of Apr 3, 2026 PLA warship warning to US Navy P-8 Poseidon at 0647 local; PLA claimed aircraft entered 24nm contiguous zone; southernmost tip of Taiwan's main island
